site.title: Celestia Island
site.subtitle: A constellation of open-source projects
site.description: A constellation of open-source projects — AI agents, web frameworks, UI libraries, authentication, and industrial tools.

entelecheia.description: Assemble teams of AI agents that divide tasks, collaborate, and deliver results. From research and analysis to code generation and workflow automation — describe your goal, and specialized agents work together to achieve it.

shittim.description: The interactive face of Entelecheia — a streaming chat interface to converse with AI agents, a control panel to configure systems and manage permissions, plus desktop and mobile apps. Everything the user sees and touches.

tairitsu.tagline: Build Full-Stack Apps, Entirely in Rust
tairitsu.description: A web framework that lets you build complete applications — frontend UI, server logic, and everything in between — using only Rust. Your app compiles into portable components that run in the browser, on the server, or at the edge. One language, one codebase.

hikari.description: A design-first UI component library with a distinctive visual identity — Eastern aesthetics meet futuristic style. Drop in polished, ready-made components and spend your energy on what your app does, not how it looks.

aoba.description: Inspect, test, and simulate Modbus industrial devices right from your terminal. Connect to real hardware, spin up virtual devices for testing, and bridge data between protocols — an indispensable companion for automation engineers on the factory floor and in CI pipelines.

kirino.tagline: Authentication & Access Control, Ready to Use
kirino.description: Add battle-tested login, role-based permissions, and security auditing to your Rust application in minutes. From simple password authentication to complex permission hierarchies with separation of duties — focus on your business logic and leave the security plumbing to Kirino.
